SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:55am
Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Caused called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Julius DeLaCruz appears in pro per. Respondent, Auto Europa appears through owner Ron Mifsud. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Renne.

EXHR (2) Invoice

11:46am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.
